Surname.jp: 主に忠実なオートマタ

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color>의 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>的几率使目标<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Heals the selected ally's Health by <color=#28d9ed>40%</color>.
description.jp: 味方単体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>回復させる。
description.zh: 使所选友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>。

description.en: Heals all allies's Health by <color=#28d9ed>35%</color> and grants a <color=#28d9ed>Barrier</color> that absorbs <color=#28d9ed>1500</color> damage for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 味方全体のHPを<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>回復させ、<color=#28d9ed>1500</color>の<color=#28d9ed>シールド</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 아군 전체의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>35%</color> 회복시키고, <color=#28d9ed>1500</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>실드</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.zh: 使全体友军的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>,并获得<color=#28d9ed>1500</color><color=#28d9ed>护盾</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nReduces <color=#28d9ed>K</color>'s damage taken by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> while <color=#28d9ed>Eva</color> is alive.\nRecovers <color=#28d9ed>K</color>'s <color=#28d9ed>Weakness Gauge</color> by <color=#28d9ed>8</color> at the start of the turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n戦場に<color=#28d9ed>【エヴァ】</color>がいる場合、<color=#28d9ed>【ケイ】</color>の受けるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>DOWNする。\nターン開始時、<color=#28d9ed>【ケイ】</color>の<color=#28d9ed>WG</color>を<color=#28d9ed>8</color>回復する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n<color=#28d9ed>에바</color>가 살아있는 동안 <color=#28d9ed>케이</color>가 받는 피해를 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 감소시킵니다. \n턴 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>케이</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>WG</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>8</color> 회복시킵니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n在<color=#28d9ed>艾娃</color>存活期间,使<color=#28d9ed>凯伊</color>所受伤害降低<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。\n回合开始时,使<color=#28d9ed>凯伊</color>的<color=#28d9ed>WG</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>8</color>。
